nasb.text: And as raiders wait for a man, So a band of priests murder on the way to Shechem; Surely they have committed crime.

esv.text: As robbers lie in wait for a man, so the priests band together; they murder on the way to Shechem; they commit villainy.

cnv.text: 在往示劍的路上，祭司結黨殺害人， 就像埋伏路旁的強盜； 他們行了邪惡的事。

ccb.text: 祭司如同暗中抢劫的强盗， 成群结伙地作恶， 在通往示剑的路上谋害无辜。
